HGSS.227.0009:
What would you like to do with
[0103,0000,0000]’s Mail?
HGSS.227.0010:
The message will be lost.
Is that OK?
HGSS.227.0012: Let a Pokémon hold this Mail?
HGSS.227.0013:
The Mail’s message was erased,
and it was put in the Bag.
HGSS.227.0014:
Your Bag is full...
The Mail was discarded.
